**Topic:** The Wikipedia page for C. Joseph Vijay

**Timeline:** No specific dates — this is a general overview.

**Subject:** Chandrasekaran Joseph Vijay is an Indian politician and former actor who is currently serving as the ninth chief minister of Tamil Nadu since May 2026.

**Explanation:** He is the founder and president of the political party Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK). Prior to entering politics, he was a leading actor in Tamil cinema and among the highest-paid actors in India, having won numerous accolades including multiple Tamil Nadu State Film Awards and South Indian International Movie Awards.

**Topic:** The Model Context Protocol (MCP)

**Timeline:** November 2024

**Subject:** The Model Context Protocol is an open-source framework introduced by Anthropic to standardize integration and data sharing between AI models and external tools.

**Explanation:** It provides a standardized interface for reading files, executing functions, and handling contextual prompts. Following its announcement in November 2024, the protocol was adopted by major AI providers, including OpenAI and Google DeepMind. The system streamlines how large language models connect with diverse data sources. This open standard aims to simplify and unify tool-use protocols across the AI ecosystem. By standardizing these integrations, developers can build more interoperable and powerful agentic workflows.
